name: multi-model-agents
description: AI Agent Swarm V1.5.3 enables streaming model calls by default to reduce long Opus/Claude and Gemini timeout risk while keeping a non-streaming fallback.

interface.shortDescription: AI Agent Swarm V1.5.3: streaming model calls enabled by default for Opus/Claude and Gemini timeout resilience.
interface.longDescription: AI Agent Swarm V1.5.3 is a local Codex multi-model orchestration plugin for long-running development. Codex keeps planning, authorization, real tests, review integration, RAG writes, and final decisions. Opus/Claude performs primary coding through the primary-coder Custom Agent calling multi_model_coder_workspace_edit. Gemini provides test strategy and failure-log analysis through the tester Custom Agent calling multi_model_tester_plan. This release enables streaming model calls by default through the model layer, aggregating SSE responses before returning MCP tool results, and keeps MMA_MODEL_STREAMING=false as a fallback for gateways that do not support streaming.
capabilities: 本地项目记忆库（轻量 RAG）
defaultPrompt: 使用 AI Agent Swarm 处理这次代码修改，默认启用可见角色子智能体工作流。
